name: MAG-7 | 暴风呼啸
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a stormy color scheme. It will be waiting for you at the monorail
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 这把武器的部分零件以暴风雨的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 它在轨道上等着你
